entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING
entities.description: The ability of a plant variety to produce a large amount of crop per unit area

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT
entities.description: The ability of a plant variety to maintain productivity under adverse climate conditions

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Agricultural traits controlled by multiple genes and environmental factors

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC-BASED SELECTION
entities.description: The process of selecting plants based on their observable physical characteristics

entities.name: GENOME-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses genomic information to select for desired traits

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The genetic material of plant origin with actual or potential value for breeding

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput DNA sequencing technology used to determine the sequence of nucleotides

entities.name: GENOME ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The structural organization of the genome, including gene order and arrangement

entities.name: STATISTICAL TOOLS
entities.description: Mathematical methods used to analyze and interpret biological data

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS TOOLS
entities.description: Software and computational tools used to analyze and manage biological data

entities.name: GENOMES
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material present in a cell or organism

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMES
entities.description: The complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome

entities.name: PROTEOME
entities.description: The entire set of proteins expressed by a genome, cell, tissue, or organism

entities.name: METABOLOMES
entities.description: The complete set of small-molecule metabolites found within a biological sample

entities.name: COMPUTATIONAL TOOLS
entities.description: Algorithmic and software-based tools used for biological data processing

entities.name: PLANT GENETICS
entities.description: The branch of biology that studies the mechanisms of heredity in plants

entities.name: BREEDING RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific research aimed at improving the genetic makeup of plants for agricultural purposes
